name: Alt
description: The Alt key on a keyboard, often used for alternate functions.

name: Backspace
description: The Backspace key, used to delete the character to the left of the cursor.

name: Caps Lock
description: The Caps Lock key, used to toggle capitalization of letters.

name: Delete
description: The Delete key, used to delete the character to the right of the cursor.

name: Enter
description: The Enter key, used to confirm a command or input a new line.

name: Function (Fn)
description: The Function (Fn) key, used to access special functions on laptops and some keyboards.

name: Ctrl
description: The Control key, often used in combination with other keys for shortcuts.

name: Escape (Esc)
description: The Escape key, used to cancel or exit a function or operation.

name: Home
description: The Home key, used to move the cursor to the beginning of a line or document.

name: Insert
description: The Insert key, used to toggle between insert and overwrite modes in text editing.

name: J
description: The 'J' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'J'.

name: K
description: The 'K' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'K'.

name: L
description: The 'L' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'L'.

name: M
description: The 'M' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'M'.

name: N
description: The 'N' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'N'.

name: O
description: The 'O' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'O'.

name: P
description: The 'P' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'P'.

name: Q
description: The 'Q' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'Q'.

name: R
description: The 'R' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'R'.

name: S
description: The 'S' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'S'.

name: T
description: The 'T' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'T'.

name: U
description: The 'U' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'U'.

name: V
description: The 'V' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'V'.

name: W
description: The 'W' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'W'.

name: X
description: The 'X' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'X'.

name: Y
description: The 'Y' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'Y'.

name: Z
description: The 'Z' key on a keyboard, representing the letter 'Z'.
